ac_text: Mandatory fields name and primary phone must be provided.
title: Valid name and phone provided updates customer profile successfully
classification_rationale: This test validates the successful update of a customer profile with mandatory fields.
preconditions: Application is deployed and accessible in UAT environment.
User account exists with role Customer_Service_Agent and has edit permission on Customer Profile module.
steps: Send a PUT request to update the customer profile with valid name and phone.
expected_result: HTTP 200 is returned. Customer profile is updated with new name and phone.
review_feedback: completeness: Missing execution detail or contains quality violations

completeness.reason: Missing execution detail or contains quality violations

ac_text: Unauthorized users cannot update customer profiles.
title: Unauthorized user cannot update customer profile
classification_rationale: This test validates that unauthorized users are correctly prevented from updating customer profiles.
preconditions: Application is deployed and accessible in UAT environment.
User account exists with role Unauthorized_User and has no permissions on Customer Profile module.
steps: Send PUT request to update customer profile with Customer ID CUST-10045 and new details.
expected_result: HTTP 403 is returned. Response body contains error message: Unauthorized access.

ac_text: Unauthorized users cannot update customer profiles.
title: User with expired token attempts to update profile
classification_rationale: This test checks that users with expired tokens cannot update profiles.
preconditions: Application is deployed and accessible in UAT environment.
User account exists with role Customer_Service_Agent and has edit permission on Customer Profile module.
User token is expired.
steps: Send PUT request to update customer profile with expired token.
expected_result: HTTP 401 is returned. Response body contains error message: Token expired.

ac_text: Unauthorized users cannot update customer profiles.
title: User attempts to update another user's profile
classification_rationale: This test ensures that users cannot update profiles they do not own.
preconditions: Application is deployed and accessible in UAT environment.
User account exists with role Customer_Service_Agent and has edit permission on Customer Profile module.
Another user profile exists with Customer ID CUST-10046.
steps: Send PUT request to update customer profile with Customer ID CUST-10046.
expected_result: HTTP 403 is returned. Response body contains error message: Access denied.

ac_text: Unauthorized users cannot update customer profiles.
title: User attempts to update profile with invalid data
classification_rationale: This test checks the system's response to invalid data submissions.
preconditions: Application is deployed and accessible in UAT environment.
User account exists with role Customer_Service_Agent and has edit permission on Customer Profile module.
steps: Send PUT request to update customer profile with empty name field.
expected_result: HTTP 400 is returned. Response body contains field-level error: Name is required.

ac_text: Unauthorized users cannot update customer profiles.
title: Security test for unauthorized access to profile update
classification_rationale: This test validates that unauthorized access attempts are logged and handled correctly.
preconditions: Application is deployed and accessible in UAT environment.
User account exists with role Unauthorized_User and has no permissions on Customer Profile module.
steps: Send PUT request to update customer profile with Customer ID CUST-10045 and new details.
expected_result: HTTP 403 is returned. Unauthorized access is logged in the system.

ac_text: Audit history must capture previous and new values.
title: Audit history captures previous and new values on successful update
classification_rationale: Validates that the audit history correctly records changes made to customer profiles.
preconditions: Application is deployed and accessible in UAT environment.
User account exists with role Customer_Service_Agent and has edit permission on Customer Profile module.
Customer profile with ID CUST-10045 exists with Name: John Doe and Phone: +1-555-0100.
steps: Update customer profile with new Name and Phone.
Save the changes.
expected_result: Audit history captures old values: Name: John Doe, Phone: +1-555-0100 and new values: Name: John Smith, Phone: +1-555-0101.

ac_text: Profile update should be reflected in downstream CRM sync jobs.
title: Valid profile update triggers sync
classification_rationale: This test validates the successful triggering of a CRM sync after a valid profile update.
preconditions: Application is deployed and accessible in UAT environment.
User account exists with role Customer_Service_Agent and has edit permission on Customer Profile module.
Customer profile with ID CUST-10045 exists.
steps: Update the customer profile with new name, phone, and email.
Click the Save button.
expected_result: Profile update is successful. CRM sync job is triggered.
review_feedback: correctness: API case uses UI-only language; Layer expectations need tightening
completeness: Missing execution detail or contains quality violations

correctness.reason: API case uses UI-only language; Layer expectations need tightening

completeness.reason: Missing execution detail or contains quality violations

ac_text: Profile update should be reflected in downstream CRM sync jobs.
title: Invalid profile update does not trigger sync
classification_rationale: This test checks that an invalid profile update does not trigger a CRM sync.

steps: Update the customer profile with an empty name field.
Click the Save button.
expected_result: Profile update fails. No CRM sync job is triggered.
